title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How important is it to have good relationships with colleagues?
What do you think makes a friendship last a long time?
Has your relationship with your parents changed as you've got older?
Do you think it's easier or harder to make friends as an adult?
What do you think is the most important quality in a close friend?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think modern life makes it harder to maintain strong relationships?
How do you think the idea of family has changed over the last few generations?
Is it possible to have a genuine friendship entirely through social media?
